features.title: Unified Extraction
features.description: Single API to extract content from Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Markdown, and PDF.

features.title: AI-Ready Chunking
features.description: Deterministic chunking with heading-aware extraction and token estimation for LLM pipelines.

features.title: Batch Processing
features.description: Process entire folders of documents with progress tracking and parallel execution.

features.title: Pluggable Handlers
features.description: Register custom format handlers to extend extraction to proprietary formats.

relatedPackages.name: OfficeIMO.Reader.Csv
relatedPackages.description: CSV and TSV adapter for Reader ingestion

relatedPackages.name: OfficeIMO.Reader.Text
relatedPackages.description: Combined CSV, JSON, and XML adapter path

relatedPackages.name: OfficeIMO.Reader.Html
relatedPackages.description: HTML adapter backed by the Markdown pipeline

relatedPackages.name: OfficeIMO.Reader.Zip
relatedPackages.description: ZIP archive adapter for safe traversal
